title: AWS unveils AI agent payments based on stablecoins
snippet: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has introduced one of the first end-to-end payment systems for AI agents, built in collaboration with Coinbase and Stripe. The new service, Amazon Bedrock AgentCore payments, enables AI agents to make micropayments to pay for API usage, web content or to pay other agents. T

title: Zcash Targeting Post-Quantum Crypto Milestone by 2027
snippet: The privacy-focused cryptocurrency plans to launch a quantum-recoverable wallet within a month as it outlines its roadmap.

title: Stablecoins won’t strengthen global role of euro, ECB’s Lagarde says
snippet: ECB President Christine Lagarde said Europe should build tokenized settlement infrastructure anchored by central bank money rather than rely on private stablecoins.

title: Tether freezes over $500M of USDT in 30 days, BlockSec data shows
snippet: BlockSec data shows Tether froze over $500 million in USDT across 370 Ethereum and Tron addresses in 30 days, adding to $1.26 billion frozen in 2025 linked to illicit activity.

title: Kraken parent Payward to buy Reap in $600 million stablecoin payments push
snippet: Kraken parent Payward agreed to buy Hong Kong-based Reap for up to $600 million, adding card issuance and stablecoin payment capabilities to its new B2B platform.

title: AUSTRAC Launches Supervision Campaigns as Australia's Crypto Regulatory Reforms Kick In
snippet: The campaigns target over-the-counter operators and local exchanges as new laws expand oversight to custody and brokerage services.

title: Solv Protocol drops LayerZero in favor of Chainlink for $700 million tokenized bitcoin
snippet: It cited security as the core reason for the migration, in an apparent response to the recent exploit of LayerZero-powered Kelp DAO.

title: ECB’s Lagarde flags euro-denominated stablecoins as financial stability risk, diverging from Bundesbank stance
snippet: The ECB President argued that euro-denominated stablecoins risk financial stability and monetary policy, pushing for a digital euro instead.
